Pebble watchface application for tracking step count, heart rate, and time with related data structures.


## Files
- **[kickstart.c](kickstart.c.md)**: Implements a Pebble watchface application that tracks and displays step count, heart rate, and time.
- **[kickstart.h](kickstart.h.md)**: Defines the `KickstartData` structure and a function to get app information for the Pebble firmware.
